CustomField.formula: IF( AND( TEXT(StageName) == "Booking Cancelled", $Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Agent_Commission_on_Cancellation_Charges__c == TRUE, $Setup.sugati__Site__c.sugati__Agency_is_End_Customer__c == TRUE ), IF(ISBLANK(sugati__O_Total_Payment_Without_CC__c), 0, sugati__O_Total_Payment_Without_CC__c) + IF(ISBLANK(sugati__S_O_Total_Agent_Commission_Rolled_up__c), 0, sugati__S_O_Total_Agent_Commission_Rolled_up__c) - IF(ISBLANK(sugati__S_O_Cancellation_Amount__c), IF(ISBLANK(sugati__O_Cancellation_Charge__c), 0, sugati__O_Cancellation_Charge__c), sugati__S_O_Cancellation_Amount__c), IF( TEXT(StageName) == "Booking Cancelled", IF(ISBLANK(sugati__O_Total_Payment_Without_CC__c), 0, sugati__O_Total_Payment_Without_CC__c) - IF(ISBLANK(sugati__S_O_Cancellation_Amount__c), IF(ISBLANK(sugati__O_Cancellation_Charge__c), 0, sugati__O_Cancellation_Charge__c), sugati__S_O_Cancellation_Amount__c), 0 ) )
CustomField.label: Refundable Amount
